steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0012_whisper_parakeet_granite_streaming and t0013_brainstorm_results_1 are completed.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure, step_tracker.json, logs/, and cache aggregator outputs.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review existing STT papers in the corpus relevant to short-clip robustness and model comparisons.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Search for brainpowa-realtime-api integration details, Granite STTAdapter patterns, and short-clip failure mode documentation.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0012 code and predictions, t0009 baselines, t0011 streaming harness, and brainpowa STTAdapter interface for reuse.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design 4-part experiment plan: synthetic dataset synthesis, GPU inference via transcribe_stream(), stratified analysis, and answer asset.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Provision Azure H100 NVL GPU machine and prepare conda stt environment with all three model paths.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Synthesize short clips, run GPU inference via transcribe_stream() for all three models, compute stratified metrics, and write answer asset.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Download results from GPU machine, destroy instance, and update cost tracking.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Explore alternative analyses: latency-accuracy tradeoff curves, failure mode clustering, and brainpowa routing strategies.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md with 3 charts, metrics.json for all 7 registered metrics, and costs.json.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare Granite and Parakeet stratified accuracy results against published baselines from the corpus.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate suggestions for follow-up tasks based on short-clip findings and production fit assessment.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture session logs, finalize task.json, and commit final reporting.
